languages.text: {n}Некрон с явной издевкой вскидывает голову. В его голосе появляется вкрадчивое шипение, словно у ядовитой гадины. {/n} "Если... бы... только я мог. Расхитителей... хватило мозгов... лишить меня... этой возможности".

{n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt. There is an insinuating hiss in its voice, like that of a venomous viper. {/n} "If... only... I could. The plunderers... had the sense to... deprive me of that possibility."
languages.original_text: {n}Некрон с явной издевкой вскидывает голову. В его голосе появляется вкрадчивое шипение, словно у ядовитой гадины. {/n} "Если... бы... только я мог. Расхитителей... хватило мозгов... лишить меня... этой возможности".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt. There is an insinuating hiss in its voice, like that of a venomous viper. {/n} "If... only... I could. The plunderers... had the sense to... deprive me of that possibility."

{n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt. There is an insinuating hiss in its voice, like that of a venomous viper. {/n} "If... only... I could. The plunderers... had the sense to... deprive me of that possibility."

{n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt. There is an insinuating hiss in its voice, like that of a venomous viper. {/n} "If... only... I could. The plunderers... had the sense to... deprive me of that possibility."

languages.text: {n}太空死灵傲然仰头，姿态里透出明显的轻蔑，声音中带着毒蛇般的险恶嘶鸣。{/n}“我倒希望……我可以……劫掠者……还算有脑子……让我没机会那么做。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt. There is an insinuating hiss in its voice, like that of a venomous viper. {/n} "If... only... I could. The plunderers... had the sense to... deprive me of that possibility."

traits.locale_text: {n}太空死灵傲然仰头，姿态里透出明显的轻蔑，声音中带着毒蛇般的险恶嘶鸣。{/n}“我倒希望……我可以……劫掠者……还算有脑子……让我没机会那么做。”

languages.text: {n}El Necrón echa la cabeza hacia atrás en un acto de desprecio. Su voz sisea con la misma intención que una víbora ponzoñosa. {/n} «Ojalá... pudiera. Los saqueadores... tuvieron la sensatez... de privarme de la posibilidad».
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt. There is an insinuating hiss in its voice, like that of a venomous viper. {/n} "If... only... I could. The plunderers... had the sense to... deprive me of that possibility."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Necrón echa la cabeza hacia atrás en un acto de desprecio. Su voz sisea con la misma intención que una víbora ponzoñosa. {/n} «Ojalá... pudiera. Los saqueadores... tuvieron la sensatez... de privarme de la posibilidad».

languages.text: {n}Le Nécron rejette la tête en arrière avec un dédain évident. Un sifflement lourd de sens s'immisce dans sa voix, à l'instar de celui d'une vipère.{/n} « Si... seulement... Je le pouvais. Les pillards... ont pris soin de... me priver de cette possibilité. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt. There is an insinuating hiss in its voice, like that of a venomous viper. {/n} "If... only... I could. The plunderers... had the sense to... deprive me of that possibility."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le Nécron rejette la tête en arrière avec un dédain évident. Un sifflement lourd de sens s'immisce dans sa voix, à l'instar de celui d'une vipère. {/n}« Si... seulement... Je le pouvais. Les pillards... ont pris soin de... me priver de cette possibilité. »

languages.text: {n}Nekron, bariz bir küçümsemeyle başını arkaya atıyor. Zehirli bir engereğinki gibi imalı bir tıslama, sesine hükmediyor.{/n} "Keşke yapabilseydim... Yağmacılar... Beni bu ihtimalden... Mahrum bırakacak kadar... Akıllıydı."
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt. There is an insinuating hiss in its voice, like that of a venomous viper. {/n} "If... only... I could. The plunderers... had the sense to... deprive me of that possibility."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nekron, bariz bir küçümsemeyle başını arkaya atıyor. Zehirli bir engereğinki gibi imalı bir tıslama, sesine hükmediyor.{/n} "Keşke yapabilseydim... Yağmacılar... Beni bu ihtimalden... Mahrum bırakacak kadar... Akıllıydı."

languages.text: {n}Der Necron wirft angewidert seinen Kopf zurück. Das Zischen in seiner Stimme gleicht dem einer giftigen Viper. {/n} "Wenn ... ich doch nur ... könnte. Die Plünderer ... waren so klug ... mich dieser Möglichkeit zu berauben."
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt. There is an insinuating hiss in its voice, like that of a venomous viper. {/n} "If... only... I could. The plunderers... had the sense to... deprive me of that possibility."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Necron wirft angewidert seinen Kopf zurück. Das Zischen in seiner Stimme gleicht dem einer giftigen Viper. {/n} "Wenn ... ich doch nur ... könnte. Die Plünderer ... waren so klug ... mich dieser Möglichkeit zu berauben."

languages.text: {n}ネクロンの首を大きく振って、明らかに侮蔑の念を露わにした。その声には、毒蛇の様なうめき声のような、不快なささやきが混じっている。{/n}「もしも…もしも…私がそうできたら。略奪者たちは…賢明に…その可能性を…奪ったのだ」
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron throws back its head with obvious contempt. There is an insinuating hiss in its voice, like that of a venomous viper. {/n} "If... only... I could. The plunderers... had the sense to... deprive me of that possibility."

traits.locale_text: ネクロンの首を大きく振って、明らかに侮蔑の念を露わにした。その声には、毒蛇の様なうめき声のような、不快なささやきが混じっている。「もしも…もしも…私がそうできたら。略奪者たちは…賢明に…その可能性を…奪ったのだ。」
